title: carduus scordium
intro: Carduus scordium, also known as Burnet-saxifrage or Burnet, is a biennial plant belonging to the Saxifragaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Carduus scordium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
